nodes.itemHTML: • Hardware for AI: Understanding computer hardware & build your own computerstars2
• Programming Community Curated Resources
• Face Detection with Computer Vision and Deep Learning by Hakan Cebeci
• Dive into Deep Learning - numpy based interactive Deep Learning book
• Deep Learning with R in Motion: a live video course that teaches how to apply deep learning to text and images using the powerful Keras library and its R language interface.
• A Beginner's Guide To Understanding Convolutional Neural Networks
• Ladder Networkstars101 - Keras Implementation of Ladder Network for Semi-Supervised Learning
• The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Recurrent Neural Networks - Andrej Karpathy blog post about using RNN for generating text.
• TensorForce - A TensorFlow library for applied reinforcement learningstars3.2k
• Grokking Deep Learning in Motion by Beau Carnes (2018)
• Machine Learning Mastery blog
• ML Compiled
• Programming Community Curated Resources
• Synapses - A lightweight library for neural networks that runs anywherestars64
• Modalitystars11 - Lightweight ORM with database reverse engineering features.
• karaoke-rsstars135 - A simple, network enabled karaoke player in Rust.
• JMapperstars197 - Uses byte code manipulation for lightning-fast mapping. Supports annotations and API or XML configuration.
• ModelMapperstars2k - Intelligent object mapping library that automatically maps objects to each other.
• Bazel - Tool from Google that builds code quickly and reliably.
• ASM - All-purpose, low-level bytecode manipulation and analysis.
• Byte Buddy - Further simplifies bytecode generation with a fluent API.
• Javassiststars3.7k - Tries to simplify bytecode editing.
• Infinispan - Highly concurrent key/value datastore used for caching.
• JOpt Simple - Fluent parser that uses the POSIX#getopt and GNU#getopt_long syntaxes.
• picocli - ANSI colors and styles in usage help with annotation-based POSIX/GNU/any syntax, subcommands, strong typing for both options and positional args.
• Clover - Relies on source-code instrumentation instead of bytecode instrumentation.
• Cobertura - Relies on offline (or static) bytecode instrumentation and class loading to collect code coverage metrics. (GPL-2.0-only)
• JaCoCo - Framework that enables collection of code coverage metrics, using both offline and runtime bytecode instrumentation.
• FreeBuilderstars794 - Automatically generates the Builder pattern.
• Joda-Beans - Small framework that adds queryable properties to Java, enhancing JavaBeans.
• ANTLR - Complex full-featured framework for top-down parsing.
• JavaCC - Parser generator that generates top-down parsers. Allows lexical state switching and permits extended BNF specifications.
• JFlex - Lexical analyzer generator.
• dotenvstars42 - Twelve-factor configuration library which uses environment-specific files.
• Choco - Off-the-shelf constraint satisfaction problem solver that uses constraint programming techniques.
• Super CSV - Powerful CSV parser with support for Dozer, Joda-Time and Java 8.
• Apache Avro - Data interchange format with dynamic typing, untagged data, and absence of manually assigned IDs.
• Apache Orc - Fast and efficient columnar storage format for Hadoop-based workloads.
• Apache Parquet - Columnar storage format based on assembly algorithms from Google's paper on Dremel.
• Apache Thrift - Data interchange format that originated at Facebook.
• Big Queuestars508 - Fast and persistent queue based on memory-mapped files.
• HyperMinHash-javastars48 - Probabilistic data structure for computing union, intersection, and set cardinality in loglog space.
• Persistent Collectionstars700 - Persistent and immutable analogue of the Java Collections Framework.
• Protobufstars56.6k - Google's data interchange format.
• SBEstars2.7k - Simple Binary Encoding, one of the fastest message formats around.
• Tapestars2.4k - Lightning-fast, transactional, file-based FIFO.
• Wirestars3.9k - Clean, lightweight protocol buffers.
• eXiststars357 - NoSQL document database and application platform. (LGPL-2.1-only)
• Redissonstars19.9k - Allows for distributed and scalable data structures on top of a Redis server.
• requerystars3.1k - Modern, lightweight but powerful object mapping and SQL generator. Easily map to or create databases, or perform queries and updates from any Java-using platform.
• Almanac Converter - Simple conversion between different calendar systems.
• Dagger - Compile-time injection framework without reflection.
• HK2 - Lightweight and dynamic dependency injection framework.
• AspectJ - Seamless aspect-oriented programming extension.
• JavaSymbolSolverstars286 - Symbol solver.
• Manifoldstars1.4k - Re-energizes Java with powerful features like type-safe metaprogramming, structural typing and extension methods.
• Axon - Framework for creating CQRS applications.
• Quasar - Lightweight threads and actors for the JVM.
• ScaleCube Servicesstars558 - Embeddable Cluster-Membership library based on SWIM and gossip protocol.
• Zuulstars12.2k - Gateway service that provides dynamic routing, monitoring, resiliency, security, and more.
• Bitronixstars397 - Simple but complete implementation of the JTA 1.1 API.
• Narayana - Provides support for traditional ACID and compensation transactions, also complies with JTA, JTS and other standards. (LGPL-2.1-only)
• Capsulestars1.1k - Simple and powerful packaging and deployment. A fat JAR on steroids, or a "Docker for Java" that supports JVM-optimized containers.
• Nexus - Binary management with proxy and caching capabilities.
• packrstars2.4k - Packs JARs, assets and the JVM for native distribution on Windows, Linux and macOS.
• documents4j - API for document format conversion using third-party converters such as MS Word.
• Squarestars38 - Integration with the Square API.
• Stripestars631 - Integration with the Stripe API.
• Daikon - Detects likely program invariants and generates JML specs based on those invariants.

• JMLOK 2.0 - Detects inconsistencies between code and JML specification through feedback-directed random tests generation, and suggests a likely cause for each nonconformance detected. (GPL-3.0-only)

• KeY - Formal software development tool that aims to integrate design, implementation, formal specification, and formal verification of object-oriented software as seamlessly as possible. Uses JML for specification and symbolic execution for verification. (GPL-2.0-or-later)
• OpenJML - Translates JML specifications into SMT-LIB format and passes the proof problems implied by the program to backend solvers. (GPL-2.0-only)
• H2GIS - Spatial extension of the H2 database. (LGPL-3.0-only)
• JavaFX - Successor of Swing.
• Tess4Jstars1.2k - JNA wrapper for Tesseract OCR API.
• SLF4J - Abstraction layer/simple logging facade.
• Smilestars5.6k - Statistical Machine Intelligence and Learning Engine provides a set of machine learning algorithms and a visualization library.
• Armeriastars4k - Asynchronous RPC/REST client/server library built on top of Java 8, Netty, HTTP/2, Thrift and gRPC.
• consul-apistars401 - Client for the Consul API: a distributed, highly available and datacenter-aware registry/discovery service.
• Eurekastars11.5k - REST-based service registry for resilient load balancing and failover.
• Helidon - Two-style approach for writing microservices: Functional-reactive and as an implementation of MicroProfile.
• Nacos - Dynamic service discovery, configuration and service management platform for building cloud native applications.
• Quarkus - Kubernetes stack tailored for the HotSpot and Graal VM.
• Membrane Service Proxystars380 - Open-source, reverse-proxy framework.
• PipelinRstars269 - Small utility library for using handlers and commands with pipelines.
• Simple Java Mailstars1k - Mailing with a clean and fluent API.
• honest-profilerstars1.2k - Low-overhead, bias-free sampling profiler.
• Rapidoid - Simple, secure and extremely fast framework consisting of an embedded HTTP server, GUI components and dependency injection.
• XChartstars1.3k - Light-weight library for plotting data. Many customizable chart types are available.
• Java Fakerstars3.8k - Port of Ruby's fake data generator.
• junit-dataproviderstars237 - TestNG-like data provider/runner for JUnit.
• fswatchstars21 - Micro library to watch for directory file system changes, simplifying java.nio.file.WatchService.
• jabbastars2.4k - Java Version Manager inspired by nvm. Supports macOS, Linux and Windows.
• Stack Overflow - Question/answer platform.
• My basics for business strategy - In 11 diagrams by Simon Wardley.
• Building Situational Awareness in the Age of Service Ecosystems - Pujadas, R; Thompson, M; Venters, W; et al. March 2019.
• Cheat Sheet (printable) - A reduced cheat sheet in a printable format. German and English version available.
• ESPstars475 - Low-cost microcontrollers with WiFi and broad IoT applications.
• CloudflareDeploy Pluginstars1 - Useful console commands for deploying CakePHP apps using Cloudflare.
• cmacstars2 - Crystal implementation of Cipher-based Message Authentication Code (CMAC)
• MetadataExtractorstars716 - Extracts metadata from media (images, video, audio) with a simple to use API.
• AdvanceDLSupportstars451 - Library to improve P/Invoke-ing native code. Interact with native objects as if they were first class objects.

• MachineLearningWithTensorFlow2ed - a book on general purpose machine learning techniques regression, classification, unsupervised clustering, reinforcement learning, auto encoders, convolutional neural networks, RNNs, LSTMs, using TensorFlow 1.14.1.

nodes.categoryHTML: Build Tools to set up performance budget
nodes.itemHTML: • Size Limitstars5.5k - Calculate the real cost to run your JS app or lib to keep good performance. Show error in pull request if the cost exceeds the limit.

nodes.categoryHTML: Build Tools to set up performance budget
nodes.itemHTML: • Size Pluginstars1.7k - Track compressed Webpack asset sizes over time.
